respondent’s age: 
 Under 6 years old: No physical activity HRSN 
 Age 6 to 17: Fewer than an average of 60 minutes per day indicates a physical activity HRSN 
 Age 18 or older: Fewer than 150 minutes per week indicates a physical activity HRSN 

Example: If a 57-year-old indicates that she exercises two days a week for 40 minutes, her score would 
be 80 minutes per week [2 days x 40 minutes = 80 minute per week]. Because she is
